title: Add SecurityContext to all Job and CronJob pod specs
description:
# GitHub Issue #128: Add SecurityContext to all Job and CronJob pod specs

**Category**: security | **Scope**: Small

**Description**: The db_sync Job, bootstrap Job, and fernet/credential rotation CronJobs in reconcile_database.go, reconcile_bootstrap.go, reconcile_fernet.go, and reconcile_credential.go do not set any SecurityContext. Add runAsNonRoot: true, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, and seccompProfile type RuntimeDefault to all Job and CronJob pod templates, matching the security posture already applied to the Deployment pods.

**Motivation**: Clusters enforcing Pod Security Standards (Restricted profile) will reject these pods outright. This is a hard blocker for production deployments in security-conscious environments.

**Affected Areas**:
- `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_database.go`
- `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_bootstrap.go`
- `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_fernet.go`
- `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_credential.go`

**Acceptance Criteria**:
- [ ] All Job and CronJob pod specs include securityContext with runAsNonRoot, readOnlyRootFilesystem, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, and seccompProfile RuntimeDefault
- [ ] Pods pass Pod Security Restricted admission
- [ ] Existing E2E tests continue to pass with the new security context

---
Source: https://github.com/C5C3/forge/issues/128

stories.title: Cluster admin deploys Keystone operator on PSS-restricted cluster
stories.want: all Job and CronJob pods created by the Keystone operator to include SecurityContext fields that satisfy the Pod Security Standards Restricted profile
stories.so_that: the pods are not rejected by the admission controller and the operator works on security-hardened clusters
criteria: db_sync Job pod spec includes SecurityContext with runAsNonRoot: true, readOnlyRootFilesystem: true, allowPrivilegeEscalation: false, and seccompProfile type RuntimeDefault
bootstrap Job pod spec includes the same SecurityContext fields
fernet-rotate CronJob pod spec (both init and main containers) includes the same SecurityContext fields
credential-rotate CronJob pod spec (both init and main containers) includes the same SecurityContext fields

stories.title: Operator developer verifies SecurityContext is applied consistently
stories.want: a shared helper function that builds the restricted SecurityContext so all Job and CronJob builders use the same settings
stories.so_that: future Jobs or CronJobs automatically get the correct security posture and changes only need to be made in one place
criteria: A restrictedSecurityContext() helper function exists in the controller package
All four builder functions (buildDBSyncJob, buildBootstrapJob, fernetRotationCronJob, credentialRotationCronJob) use the helper
The helper returns a corev1.SecurityContext with all four required fields set

stories.title: Existing reconciliation behavior is preserved after SecurityContext addition
stories.want: all existing unit and integration tests to continue passing after SecurityContext is added
stories.so_that: the security hardening does not introduce regressions
criteria: All existing unit tests in reconcile_database_test.go, reconcile_bootstrap_test.go, reconcile_fernet_test.go, and reconcile_credential_test.go pass
Integration tests pass with the new SecurityContext
PodSpecHash changes are handled correctly (existing completed jobs with old hashes will be detected as stale and re-created)

stories.title: SecurityContext is verified by dedicated tests
stories.want: new unit tests that explicitly verify the SecurityContext settings on all Job and CronJob pod specs
stories.so_that: any accidental removal of SecurityContext fields is caught by the test suite
criteria: Test verifies db_sync Job container SecurityContext has all four required fields
Test verifies bootstrap Job container SecurityContext has all four required fields
Test verifies fernet-rotate CronJob main and init container SecurityContext has all four required fields
Test verifies credential-rotate CronJob main and init container SecurityContext has all four required fields

requirements.rationale: Required by PSS Restricted profile; prevents containers from gaining additional privileges

scenarios.name: bootstrap Job sets allowPrivilegeEscalation false

scenarios.name: fernet CronJob sets allowPrivilegeEscalation false on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and fernet-rotate container SecurityContext have AllowPrivilegeEscalation set to false

scenarios.name: credential CronJob sets allowPrivilegeEscalation false on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and credential-rotate container SecurityContext have AllowPrivilegeEscalation set to false

requirements.description: All Job and CronJob container SecurityContexts SHALL set runAsNonRoot to true
requirements.rationale: Required by PSS Restricted profile; ensures containers do not run as root

scenarios.name: db_sync Job sets runAsNonRoot true
scenarios.then: the db-sync container SecurityContext has RunAsNonRoot set to true

scenarios.name: bootstrap Job sets runAsNonRoot true
scenarios.then: the bootstrap container SecurityContext has RunAsNonRoot set to true

scenarios.name: fernet CronJob sets runAsNonRoot true on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and fernet-rotate container SecurityContext have RunAsNonRoot set to true

scenarios.name: credential CronJob sets runAsNonRoot true on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and credential-rotate container SecurityContext have RunAsNonRoot set to true

requirements.description: All Job and CronJob container SecurityContexts SHALL set readOnlyRootFilesystem to true
requirements.rationale: Required by PSS Restricted profile; prevents writes to the container root filesystem

scenarios.name: db_sync Job sets readOnlyRootFilesystem true
scenarios.then: the db-sync container SecurityContext has ReadOnlyRootFilesystem set to true

scenarios.name: bootstrap Job sets readOnlyRootFilesystem true
scenarios.then: the bootstrap container SecurityContext has ReadOnlyRootFilesystem set to true

scenarios.name: fernet CronJob sets readOnlyRootFilesystem true on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and fernet-rotate container SecurityContext have ReadOnlyRootFilesystem set to true

scenarios.name: credential CronJob sets readOnlyRootFilesystem true on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and credential-rotate container SecurityContext have ReadOnlyRootFilesystem set to true

requirements.description: All Job and CronJob container SecurityContexts SHALL set seccompProfile type to RuntimeDefault
requirements.rationale: Required by PSS Restricted profile; enables the runtime's default seccomp profile for syscall filtering

scenarios.name: db_sync Job sets seccompProfile RuntimeDefault
scenarios.then: the db-sync container SecurityContext has SeccompProfile with Type set to RuntimeDefault

scenarios.name: bootstrap Job sets seccompProfile RuntimeDefault
scenarios.then: the bootstrap container SecurityContext has SeccompProfile with Type set to RuntimeDefault

scenarios.name: fernet CronJob sets seccompProfile RuntimeDefault on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and fernet-rotate container SecurityContext have SeccompProfile with Type set to RuntimeDefault

scenarios.name: credential CronJob sets seccompProfile RuntimeDefault on all containers
scenarios.then: both the copy-keys init container and credential-rotate container SecurityContext have SeccompProfile with Type set to RuntimeDefault

requirements.description: SecurityContext SHALL be applied via a shared helper function to ensure consistency
requirements.rationale: A single helper function prevents configuration drift across the four builder functions and simplifies future changes

scenarios.name: Helper returns correct SecurityContext
scenarios.then: it returns a *corev1.SecurityContext with AllowPrivilegeEscalation=false, RunAsNonRoot=true, ReadOnlyRootFilesystem=true, SeccompProfile.Type=RuntimeDefault

scenarios.name: All builders use the helper
scenarios.when: any of the four builder functions is called
scenarios.then: the SecurityContext on every container matches the output of restrictedSecurityContext()

requirements.description: Existing reconciliation behavior SHALL NOT change except for the addition of SecurityContext
requirements.rationale: This is a security hardening change that must not alter any functional behavior

scenarios.name: All existing unit tests pass
scenarios.when: the full unit test suite is run
scenarios.then: all tests pass without modification (SecurityContext addition is additive)

scenarios.name: PodSpecHash changes correctly
scenarios.when: a Job or CronJob was previously created without SecurityContext
scenarios.then: the pod-spec hash changes and the operator detects it as stale, triggering re-creation
and_then: this is expected and correct behavior for the upgrade path

tasks.title: Add restrictedSecurityContext() helper and unit test in reconcile_deployment.go (REQ-005, CC-0045)
tasks.description: Add a new function `restrictedSecurityContext()` in `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_deployment.go` (alongside existing helpers like `commonLabels()` and `containerResources()`) that returns `*corev1.SecurityContext` with AllowPrivilegeEscalation=ptr.To(false), RunAsNonRoot=ptr.To(true), ReadOnlyRootFilesystem=ptr.To(true), SeccompProfile={Type: corev1.SeccompProfileTypeRuntimeDefault}. Add import for `k8s.io/utils/ptr` if not already present. Add a unit test `TestRestrictedSecurityContext` in a test file that verifies all four fields are set correctly.

Add a new test `TestFernetRotationCronJob_SecurityContext` in `reconcile_fernet_test.go` that calls `fernetRotationCronJob()` and verifies SecurityContext on both containers has all four required fields. Verify existing tests still pass.

tasks.title: Add SecurityContext to credentialRotationCronJob() (init + main containers) and test (REQ-001, REQ-002, REQ-003, REQ-004, CC-0045)
tasks.description: In `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_credential.go`, add `SecurityContext: restrictedSecurityContext()` to BOTH the copy-keys init container and the credential-rotate main container in `credentialRotationCronJob()`. Add a new test `TestCredentialRotationCronJob_SecurityContext` in `reconcile_credential_test.go` that calls `credentialRotationCronJob()` and verifies SecurityContext on both containers has all four required fields. Verify existing tests still pass.

tasks.title: Run full unit and integration test suite to verify no regressions (REQ-006, CC-0045)
tasks.description: Run `go test ./operators/keystone/internal/controller/...` to verify all existing unit tests pass. Run `go test -tags=integration ./operators/keystone/internal/controller/...` if envtest is available. Verify that the PodSpecHash changes are correctly detected (the stale job tests in reconcile_database_test.go and reconcile_bootstrap_test.go validate this automatically since the hash is computed from the PodSpec which now includes SecurityContext).

review_criteria: All four builder functions (buildDBSyncJob, buildBootstrapJob, fernetRotationCronJob, credentialRotationCronJob) set SecurityContext on EVERY container (including init containers)
SecurityContext includes all four fields: AllowPrivilegeEscalation=false, RunAsNonRoot=true, ReadOnlyRootFilesystem=true, SeccompProfile.Type=RuntimeDefault
A shared restrictedSecurityContext() helper is used by all builders to prevent drift
All existing unit tests pass without modification
New dedicated SecurityContext tests exist for all four builder functions
go vet and golangci-lint pass without errors
implementation_notes:
## Architecture

This is a container-level SecurityContext change across 4 files. The PSS Restricted profile requires these fields at the container level (not pod level) for full compliance.

## Key Decision: Container-level vs Pod-level SecurityContext

Use container-level `SecurityContext` (not pod-level `PodSecurityContext`) because:
1. `allowPrivilegeEscalation` and `readOnlyRootFilesystem` are container-level-only fields — they do not exist on PodSecurityContext
2. The CronJobs have init containers that also need the settings
3. Container-level is the most explicit and PSS-compliant approach

## Helper Function Location

Place `restrictedSecurityContext()` in `reconcile_deployment.go` alongside existing helpers like `commonLabels()` and `containerResources()`. This file already serves as the shared utilities file for the controller package.

## PodSpecHash Impact

Adding SecurityContext changes the PodSpec, which changes the hash computed by `job.PodSpecHash()`. This means:
- Existing completed Jobs with the old hash will be detected as stale on the next reconcile
- The operator will delete and re-create them (expected upgrade behavior)
- This is tested by existing stale-hash tests (TestReconcileDatabase_StaleDBSyncJob_Recreated, TestReconcileBootstrap_StaleJobDetection)

## Pointer Helper

Use `k8s.io/utils/ptr.To()` for boolean pointer fields (already used in integration_test.go). Import: `k8s.io/utils/ptr`.

## Files to Modify

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_deployment.go` | Add `restrictedSecurityContext()` helper |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_database.go` | Add SecurityContext to db-sync container |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_bootstrap.go` | Add SecurityContext to bootstrap container |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_fernet.go` | Add SecurityContext to copy-keys init + fernet-rotate containers |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_credential.go` | Add SecurityContext to copy-keys init + credential-rotate containers |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_deployment_test.go` | Add TestRestrictedSecurityContext |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_database_test.go` | Add TestBuildDBSyncJob_SecurityContext |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_bootstrap_test.go` | Add TestBuildBootstrapJob_SecurityContext |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_fernet_test.go` | Add TestFernetRotationCronJob_SecurityContext |
| `operators/keystone/internal/controller/reconcile_credential_test.go` | Add TestCredentialRotationCronJob_SecurityContext |
